{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032201505289A4C2B62E36583BD7D6"}"},"total":1211},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7197437945740002083","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太精彩了，太感人了，太励志了，这本书绝对是21世纪绝世之作，哪有想到作者的文笔写的这么好，让我特别的感动。潸然泪下手法巧妙萊垍頭條。这本书文章文采斐然，辞藻华美，语言朴实，文笔清新，情感丰富，人物形象饱满，条理清晰，结构层次分明，情节合理，跌宕起伏，描写生动引人入胜，艺术感染力强，结尾画龙点睛，寓意深刻，发人深思， 意味悠长，有生之年能看到这本小说，绝对是我的荣幸，我真是佩服作者的头脑，多少别人办不成的事能一到便迎刃而解，作者这本书写的如行云流水，徜徉恣肆！👍👍👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1675784203,"group_id":"7183199606342159371","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不看钙文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N94XY55D/DS/Fw9Xmgz5k3FPwqkxYs5JwQTBmWGcO5wH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/17553594a522409f86a51e4584d6b023~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706250&x-signature=XD4qkvnX4dti5VmPcz1P9ufo73I%3D","user_id":"1794023283493368","user_name":"番茄第一弔毛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1794023283493368","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7183199606342159371","book_info":{"abstract":"作为一名自以为全职的扑街作者，如何能忍受读者的谩骂，于是李浩在和仅有的几名读者互骂三天三夜后，成功把自己气炸了，怨气冲天，最终大道出手，化身系统，体验各大网文世界
ps作者正在尝试一种新类型小说，故事分为很多世界，每个世界作者书写风格都不同，有些世界可能搞笑逗比了一点，千人千面，没有任何作者能写出所有人喜欢的书，若有不满意，请谅解!
主角是系统，系统，系统，不是宿主！不是宿主！不是宿主！

舔狗光环?降低智商?这就是我要的宿主
绿茶闺蜜?别慌！放她鸽子！泡她闺蜜！
于是，第一个世界，李浩就玩崩了！
ps第一个世界已经完结，作者愿称为诸天第一绿茶宿主女友，读者大佬们看完可以说说谁不爱这样的绿茶!
第二个世界已完结，灵异逗比类型，系统和宿主卡bugs收割本源，持续无脑搞笑
第三个世界，有毒，修仙界分神期以下慎重阅读～不好看，这个世界跳过吧！
友情提示，读者流逝率仅在本书前十章，抗过十章你会喜欢本书","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3935eaf1c6b285873cf3b09288468530~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一个闲客","author_id":"","book_id":"7183199606342159371","book_name":"扑街作者化身系统，坑骗诸天万界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#501010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2030人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7183343119696560697","read_count":"2030","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"446078"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"203","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,诸天万界,穿书,开局,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a59f224d262f6bf0b965df7badce670d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779299452&x-signature=P0w%2BcZhNd%2BhFyQRemmhanjDBMqk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"91727305053","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novel
